message:
perf(vdbe): eliminate Arc<[u8]> allocation in MakeRecord via sideband buffer

MakeRecord was allocating Arc::from(&rec_buf[..]) per row — a heap
allocation + memcpy of the serialized record. The Arc was never shared
(created in MakeRecord, consumed in Insert, dropped immediately).

New approach: MakeRecord keeps serialized bytes in make_record_buf and
sets make_record_sideband_reg to signal Insert to read from there
directly. Insert takes ownership of the buffer, passes &[u8] to
table_insert, then returns the buffer for reuse.

This eliminates one heap allocation + 4KB memcpy per INSERT row on
the hot path. Saves ~50-150ns per row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
